prestazioni: Engine swap to a 1UZ-FE VVTi (3.0L V8, 32-valve) with a custom forged internals build featuring JE 9.0:1 compression pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a Tomei 272° camshaft set for 12 psi boost, targeting 650 hp at the wheels on E85 fuel with a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU managing the standalone fuel and ignition system.

Full custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with a 4-2-1 equal-length header setup, 304-grade stainless steel piping, and a custom titanium dual-exit muffler by Fujitsubo Giken for weight reduction and optimal scavenging, paired with a Tomei 4.1:1 exhaust manifold for the 1UZ-FE VVTi.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (Crown Majesta-specific valving), custom polyurethane bushings by SuperPro (part #SPF0115K) for the front control arms, and a full chassis reinforcement kit by CUSCO including a 4-point strut tower bar (part #604 490 A) and a bolt-in rear subframe brace (part #604 491 A) to eliminate flex under high lateral loads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody conversion kit (Crown Majesta-specific, part #RB-CMJ-03) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, paired with a custom 3M Matte Pearl White wrap with gloss black accents on the lower rockers and mirror caps.

Custom 20x10 ET+15 and 20x11 ET+20 forged aluminum wheels by Work Emotion CR Kiwami (10-spoke design) in a staggered setup, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/20 front, 305/25/20 rear) for optimal grip and heat management.

Full interior overhaul with Recaro SP-G (Crown Majesta-specific mounting brackets) front seats, a custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and door cards by Status Racing, and a custom roll cage by AutoPower (part #AP-8P-CMJ) with bolt-in rear strut tower braces for structural rigidity and a motorsport aesthetic.
